briefdescription.para: Set read options, which are used in.
Set write options, which are used in.
Creates new Write Batch - an object, which can be used to efficiently write bulk data.

memberdef.argsstring: (const std::string &prefix_base, const std::string &middle_part, const std::string &remainder_prefix) const
memberdef.name: query

briefdescription.para: Queries with a middle part that can be a wildcard, negated string or normal string.

parameterdescription.para: The remainder part of the query prefix

briefdescription.para: Returns true if given key-value binding exists in the storage.

simplesect.para: true if key has value, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Returns true if the storage is empty.

simplesect.para: result containing void if put successful, error otherwise

briefdescription.para: Gets all key value pairs on rocksdb.
Factory method to create an instance of rocksdb class.

parameterdescription.para: filesystem path where database is going to be
rocksdb options, such as caching, logging, etc.

briefdescription.para: Factory method to create an instance of rocksdb class.
An implementation of PersistentBufferMap interface, which uses rocksdb as underlying storage.
